card_description: Time moving at right angles to linear time; multiple intersecting temporal dimensions in PKD's cosmology.
full_description:
Time moving at right angles to linear time; multiple intersecting temporal dimensions in PKD's cosmology.

**Category:** Time Metaphysics

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_68.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_129.txt
